rows.label: qev030607_MSG0001
rows.name:
Someone reliable like Heptana-san is
the perfect match for Nemard, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG0002
rows.name:
Yes... I'm sure this is for the
best... As long as he's happy,
I am... happy too, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG1001
rows.name:
...What should I do... I've run
out of knitting materials, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG1002
rows.name:
Even though I decided to confess
to him once this was finished... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG1003
rows.name:
I'm such an idiot... Why didn't
I prepare properly, na...? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_JNK0010
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Enneana what she is troubled about.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_JNK0020
rows.name: Inform[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_SEL0021
rows.name: Tell Enneana that Nemard said he wants to marry her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG1004
rows.name:
Ah... You are!? ...Eh... an
acquaintance of Nemard's!? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG1005
rows.name:
I can't... tell someone like that...
Because this is for his... No! I can't...
I have to tell him this directly! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG1006
rows.name:
...Eh!? Eeeeeeh!? Nemard said
he wants to marry Enneana!? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG1007
rows.name:
N-no way! To think something
like a dream could happen... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG1008
rows.name:
...Nemard said he wants
to marry Enneana!? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG1009
rows.name:
That can't be... You're
lying, right? Because... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG2001
rows.name:
Enneana was planning to confess to him
once this knitting was finished, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG2002
rows.name:
Even though he probably wouldn't fall
in love with Enneana anyway... I just
wanted to convey my feelings... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG2003
rows.name:
And yet... for him to talk about marriage...
Somehow I'm so happy it's scary... Umm...
you're not lying, are you? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_SEL0031
rows.name: Tell her honestly that it is not a lie.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_JNK0040
rows.name: Lie[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_SEL0041
rows.name: Lie and say it was actually a lie.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG2004
rows.name:
I see... he's already started
making the horn ring... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG2005
rows.name:
...In that case, Enneana... wants
to finish making this knitting and
give it to him no matter what. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG2006
rows.name:
Eh!? Eeeeeeeeh!? Why would
you tell such a cruel lie! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG2007
rows.name:
But... you're right... There's
no way he would love someone
like Enneana... after all... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG2008
rows.name:
...Wait! That was a lie too!? He's
already started making the horn ring!? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG2009
rows.name:
W-Why would you do something like
this to toy with Enneana? Umm...
it's really true this time, right? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG2010
rows.name:
Phew... you surprised me... ...But, in that
case, Enneana... wants to finish making this
knitting and give it to him no matter what. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG2011
rows.name:
Enneana wants to properly show him her
feelings in a physical form too. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG2012
rows.name:
...Please, I beg you! Could you go
and get me some Lightweight Pelts? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG2013
rows.name:
If I have those, my gift to him will be
complete. Enneana will take it with her
when she goes to him as his bride, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG4001
rows.name:
Please, go get the
Lightweight Pelts, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG4002
rows.name:
With them, Enneana will make the
perfect stomach band for him...
and present it as a gift. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG4003
rows.name:
Please. I'm sure Enneana's feelings will
be conveyed along with the gift... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG3001
rows.name:
How did it go? Were you able to get your
hands on the Lightweight Pelts, na? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG3002
rows.name:
Thank you... With this, I can convey
my feelings to Nemard too, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG3003
rows.name:
Marriage... it's a mysterious word somehow,
na. Just saying it makes me feel sweet, and
wistful, like I'm going to melt, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG3004
rows.name:
You are an acquaintance of Nemard's,
aren't you? From your eyes, what kind
of Bias does Nemard look like, na? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_JNK0050
rows.name: Favorable[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_SEL0051
rows.name: Express a favorable opinion about Nemard.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_JNK0060
rows.name: Critical[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_SEL0061
rows.name: Express a critical opinion about Nemard.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG3005
rows.name:
Heh heh, Enneana shares the same opinion.
Everyone calls Nemard a weakling and
says cruel things about him, but... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG3006
rows.name:
Enneana doesn't know anyone who
can always be so consistently
kind to someone else, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG3007
rows.name:
Everyone says that, don't they. That even
though he's a Bias man, he's bad at hunting
and fighting, and he's unmanly... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG3008
rows.name:
But, Enneana thinks differently, na. Because
he is very strong... that's why he can
always be kind to anyone like that, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG3009
rows.name:
You see... Enneana... was crying
every day out of fear when I was
captured by the Growth. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG3010
rows.name:
Then Nemard came by and gave
me knitting tools that he got
from who knows where. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG3011
rows.name:
There's no way things like that would be
in a place like that... He must have
risked danger to get them for me, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG3012
rows.name:
And yet, he just said, "This will distract
you a little, right?" as if it was the
most natural thing in the world... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG3013
rows.name:
Enneana doesn't know anyone else who
is like the sun like he is, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG3014
rows.name:
...Enneana is going to marry Nemard. I
think the wedding will probably start
soon, so you should come too, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG5001
rows.name:
...The ring Nemard made, risking
his life to fight beasts and get
a horn just for Enneana... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG5002
rows.name:
Just seeing that made me realize
his feelings are genuine... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG5003
rows.name:
I'm happy, but... it's scary, na... What
can Enneana do for him, na? Will I be
able to properly support him, na...? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG6001
rows.name:
...Even though I'm this happy right
now, if I put on that horn ring,
what will happen to Enneana... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG6002
rows.name: Really, I'm so happy it's scary, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG7001
rows.name:
Ah! You came back for me! Enneana
and Nemard have a favor they
want to ask of you, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030607_MSG7002
rows.name:
Nemard said he would talk to
you himself, so I want you to
go talk to him for a bit, na. [ST:wait ]
